+
+import os
+
+from ament_index_python.packages import get_package_share_directory
+
+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch.actions import IncludeLaunchDescription, DeclareLaunchArgument
+from launch.substitutions import LaunchConfiguration
+from launch.conditions import UnlessCondition
+from launch.launch_description_sources import PythonLaunchDescriptionSource
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+    """Launch Sim specifics applications (typically the ones in startups)."""
+    ld = LaunchDescription()
+
+    omni_base_2dnav = get_package_share_directory("omni_base_2dnav")
+    omni_base_laser_sensors = get_package_share_directory("omni_base_laser_sensors")
+
+    declare_is_public_sim_arg = DeclareLaunchArgument(
+        "is_public_sim",
+        default_value="false",
+        description="Whether or not you are using a public simulation",
+    )
+
+    # Simulation + Robot Navigation Applications
+    # ====================================
+    omni_base_nav_bringup_launch = IncludeLaunchDescription(
+        PythonLaunchDescriptionSource(
+            os.path.join(omni_base_2dnav, "launch", "omni_base_nav_bringup.launch.py")
+        ),
+    )
+
+    # Simulation Navigation Applications Only
+    # =================================
+    # Private + Public Simulation
+    # ---------------------------
+    # Laser Filters
+    laser_filters_launch = IncludeLaunchDescription(
+        PythonLaunchDescriptionSource(
+            [
+                os.path.join(
+                    omni_base_laser_sensors, "launch", "laser_filters.launch.py"
+                )
+            ]
+        )
+    )
+
+    # Private Simulation Only
+    # ------------------
+    # Can throw if some pkg is not available in public sim
+    ld.add_action(declare_is_public_sim_arg)
+    try:
+        # Navigation Configuration Monitor
+        nav_cfg_monitor_launch = IncludeLaunchDescription(
+            PythonLaunchDescriptionSource(
+                [
+                    os.path.join(
+                        get_package_share_directory(
+                            "pal_navigation_cfg_monitor"
+                        ),
+                        "launch",
+                        "navigation_cfg_monitor.launch.py",
+                    )
+                ]
+            ),
+            condition=UnlessCondition(LaunchConfiguration("is_public_sim")),
+        )
+        ld.add_action(nav_cfg_monitor_launch)
+    except Exception:
+        pass
+
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld.add_action(omni_base_nav_bringup_launch)
+    ld.add_action(laser_filters_launch)
+
+    return ld

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0.2)
+project(omni_base_2dnav)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package()
+
+# install(
+#     PROGRAMS
+#         scripts/record_mapping.sh
+#         scripts/record_move_base.sh
+#         scripts/record_odom.sh
+#         scripts/record_patrol.sh
+#         scripts/record_rgbd.sh
+#     DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_BIN_DESTINATION})
+
+foreach(dir launch config)
+    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
+endforeach(dir)

+<launch>
+  <arg name="laser" default="sick-561"/>
+
+  <!-- Rear Laser Scan -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_laser_sensors)/launch/$(arg laser)_laser.launch">
+    <arg name="side" value="rear"/>
+    <arg name="device_number" value="1"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Front Laser Scan -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_laser_sensors)/launch/$(arg laser)_laser.launch">
+    <arg name="side" value="front"/>
+    <arg name="device_number" value="0"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Laser Scan Merger -->
+  <node pkg="ira_laser_tools" name="laserscan_multi_merger" type="laserscan_multi_merger" output="screen">
+    <param name="destination_frame" value="base_laser_link"/>
+    <param name="cloud_destination_topic" value="/merged_cloud"/>
+    <param name="scan_destination_topic" value="/scan_raw"/>
+    <param name="laserscan_topics" value ="/scan_front_raw /scan_rear_raw" /> 
+    <param name="time_increment" value ="0.0" /> 
+    <param name="scan_time" value ="0.0" /> 
+    <param name="range_min" value ="0.05" /> 
+    <param name="range_max" value ="25.0" /> 
+    <param name="angle_min" value ="-3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_max" value ="3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_increment" value ="0.005769" /> 
+  </node>
+
+  <!-- Laser Scan Merger -->
+  <!-- <node pkg="lasermux" name="lasermux" type="lasermux_node" output="screen">
+    <param name="frame_id" value="base_laser_link"/>
+    <param name="scans_in" value ="[/scan_front_raw /scan_rear_raw]" /> 
+    <param name="range_min" value ="0.05" /> 
+    <param name="range_max" value ="25.0" /> 
+    <param name="angle_min" value ="-3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_max" value ="3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_increment" value ="0.005769" /> 
+  </node> -->
+
+
+  <node name="laser_filter" pkg="laser_filters" type="scan_to_scan_filter_chain">
+    <rosparam file="$(find omni_base_laser_sensors)/config/$(arg laser)_filter.yaml" command="load"/>
+    <remap from="scan"          to="scan_raw"/>
+    <remap from="scan_filtered" to="scan"/>
+  </node>
+
+
+</launch>

+import os

+
+from launch import LaunchDescription

+def generate_launch_description():
+    nav2_bringup_pkg = os.path.join(
+        get_package_share_directory("pal_navigation_cfg_bringup"), "launch"
+    )
+    omni_base_2dnav = get_package_share_directory("omni_base_2dnav")
+
+    is_robot_arg = DeclareLaunchArgument(
+        'is_robot', default_value='false',
+        description='Real Robot or Simulated one'
+    )
+
+    nav_bringup_launch = IncludeLaunchDescription(
+        PythonLaunchDescriptionSource(
+            os.path.join(nav2_bringup_pkg, "nav_bringup.launch.py")
+        ),
+        launch_arguments={
+            "params_file": os.path.join(omni_base_2dnav, "params", "omni_base_nav.yaml"),
+            "remappings_file": os.path.join(omni_base_2dnav, "params",
+                                            "omni_base_remappings.yaml"),
+        }.items()
+    )
+
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld = LaunchDescription()
+    ld.add_action(is_robot_arg)
+    ld.add_action(nav_bringup_launch)
+
+    return ld

+#* If not set, following default parameters will be used
+
+bt_navigator: navigate_w_replanning_and_recovery  # Default: navigate_w_replanning_and_recovery
+controller: dwb_w_progress_checker_and_goal_checker # Default: dwb_w_progress_checker_and_goal_checker
+global_costmap: global  # Default: global
+local_costmap: local  # Default: local
+map_server: map  # Default: map
+planner : navfn # Default navfn
+recovery_behaviors: spin_backup_wait  # Default spin_backup_wait
+slam: slam_toolbox # Default slam_toolbox
+map_server: map  # Default: map
+localization: amcl_diff # Default: amcl_diff

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+#* Remappings that will be applied to all the Navigation,
+#* SLAM and Localization parameters for TIAGo OMNI Base Robot
+#* If not set, following default parameters will be used
+
+global_frame : "map"  # Default: "map"
+base_link_frame : "base_link" # Default: "base_link"
+odom_topic : "/mobile_base_controller/odom"  # Default: "/odom"
+use_sim_time : True # Default: True
+robot_radius : 0.275  # Default: 0.275
+scan_topic : "/scan_raw"  # Default: "/scan_raw"
+odom_frame : "odom" # Default: "odom"
+base_footprint_frame : "base_footprint" # Default: "base_footprint"
